issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' with condition checking opponent caused it, not raw OnKO. The effect only triggers 'When this Character is K.O.'d by your opponent's effect' — needs condition to verify opponent as source.
SearchDeck action incomplete: missing filter for {Straw Hat Crew} type. Current filter only checks cost; must also filter by type 'Straw Hat Crew'.
Action says 'play up to 1' but DSL uses destination 'board'. Should clarify if this means play (auto-deploy) or just search-to-board. Likely correct but ambiguous.
Missing mechanic: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' — no action specified for reordering/placing remaining cards. SearchDeck typically handles this, but should be explicit.
